title: Fix literated text in near-global example

body:
A couple of bugs have been fixed. Now the one degree is stable. To be correct we need to implement a [PolarBoundaryCondition](https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl/pull/3953) for JRA55 fields and the input bathymetry since they span (-90, 90) on a latitude-longitude grid.

Also fixes a small bug where `Time` was not imported in `PrescribedAtmospheres` and brings the syntax of the other examples up to speed os that the docs run.

labels.description: Add this label to built the docs in a PR
labels.name: build docs

title: One degree simulation in the examples and correct documentation
